info.name: Hospital Management System - Auth Module
info.description: Postman collection for testing the Authentication and Authorization module of the Hospital Management System

request.description: Register a new user with specified roles
Login as admin user to get access token
Login as doctor user
Refresh access token using refresh token
Get all users (requires USER_READ permission)
Get user by ID (requires USER_READ permission)
Get user by username (requires USER_READ permission)
Create a new user (requires USER_WRITE permission)
Update user details (requires USER_WRITE permission)
Soft delete user (requires USER_DELETE permission)
Reset user password (requires USER_WRITE permission)
Assign a role to user (requires USER_WRITE permission)
Remove a role from user (requires USER_WRITE permission)
Get all roles (requires ROLE_READ permission)
Get role by ID (requires ROLE_READ permission)
Get role by name (requires ROLE_READ permission)
Create a new role (requires ROLE_WRITE permission)
Update role details (requires ROLE_WRITE permission)
Soft delete role (requires ROLE_DELETE permission)
Assign permission to role (requires ROLE_WRITE permission)
Remove permission from role (requires ROLE_WRITE permission)
Get all permissions (requires PERMISSION_READ permission)
Get permission by ID (requires PERMISSION_READ permission)
Get permission by name (requires PERMISSION_READ permission)
Create a new permission (requires PERMISSION_WRITE permission)
Update permission description (requires PERMISSION_WRITE permission)
Soft delete permission (requires PERMISSION_DELETE permission)
Get current user's approval status
Get all pending approval requests (Admin only)
Submit approval request for user (Admin only)
Approve an approval request (Admin only)
Reject an approval request (Admin only)
Get current user's uploaded documents
Upload document for verification
Get all documents pending verification (Admin only)
Verify or reject a document (Admin only)
Test accessing protected endpoint without token - should return 401
Test accessing protected endpoint with invalid token - should return 401
Test accessing endpoint without required permission - should return 403
